name: OpenMark AI Router
description: Benchmark-driven model routing. Routes tasks to optimal models using real evaluation data from OpenMark AI — accuracy, cost, latency, stability.

classifier_model.description: Model used for the isolated classification call (e.g. google/gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview)

no_route_passthrough.description: Model to use when no benchmark category matches (greetings, follow-ups, etc.)

port.description: Port for the embedded routing server

show_routing_card.description: Prepend routing card to responses when a task is routed
